samples:
I'm gonna take your life and watch you die
While wearing a smile upon my face
If I could just get into your head


I hope that this means something to you
You're the one who asked for this
It doesn't mean nothing to me, so
Shut up! Die already! Shut up!

Take whatever you want from me, fucker
Just remember I warned you of what would come down on you if you kept pressing it all on me


If you must know
The end is near
The son will rise again soon enough
This time to set things right within our ways
So we can start over again


You better hold on to everything you've got now
It's about to slip away


If I could just get into your head




Here comes the Son of Man now
He'll be riding in on the clouds above us
Watch him as he comes down to fix what's broken
Oh no, oh lord, why don't they read their history?

There's a light in your eyes
It won't leave you the way that you want it to
You seem to be scared of all the things
That have yet to come, oh


Well, I hope when this is over and done
And we both look up from our knees
The past few days will have not been in vain
As long as one thing comes through for me

I know what I wanna do to you
To feel alive again


We are just beginning, see?
Something here to take us back home


We could disappear now
But then how would you even recognize me?
This old skin enchants me, don't judge
Just because my soul feels so naked



Well, I hope when this is over and done
And we both look up from our knees
The past few days will have not been in vain
As long as one thing comes through for me


I know what I wanna do to you
To feel alive again

Underneath the skin and just beneath our smile
Are demons that desire to consume us all


Fear, fear, fear is an ugly, old son-a-gun


I pray we never see his face again
So soon


If not for your grace, we'd be nothing but blood, tears and
Anger and hate, hatred and pain
Satan was a liar from the start and so are you
You are a son of a bitch who lies, and he speaks through me
Your father was a liar when he told you
"All I ask is your time, your loyalty, your patience."


There are only two things in life that matter to me
My faith in Christ Jesus and my will to feed on thee


Why don't you go suck some coconut dipshit?

What happened to trust? Where did it go?
Why can't I speak now? Why can't I move?
Can't hold you here forever, my little piece of mind

It's time for you to die, it's time for you to die
Die right now
Now die


No one ever hurt you like this before
But, sadly, no one ever loved you like this either
Weep for this child who does not want to sleep
How dare you let us down by choosing sides


Demons, they're a legion; they have legions of their own
They whisper promises to us in a voice of honey
Temptations whispered over wine and candlelight


The more we enter into temptation's light
The weaker we become until we reach an end and there
When temptations fade away, what do we remember?
Is it our capacity to forgive and love one another?
Or could it simply be one giant step away from reason
One fatiguing stumble over common ground that we’ve both chosen


Beneath the skin and just below my smile
I feel the demons whispering, "Give way"
As I stare into your eyes deep and black as night
I hear them telling me, "Follow me"

It's time for you to die, it's time for you to die
Die right now

The more you try to control
The one that speaks from within, the less you will be able to see through your own confines
So let it be, a part of me, let me in and guide us home


All our lives are but an echo
Reaching out before we're ready
If only we could recognize that we have just what we need right here, now
Trust yourself enough to listen
Open up so I may whisper
As well as speak so that together, you and I both might feel safe and free


Let go, give in
You must realize your faith is bound to heal all wounds
This veil between this life and light has come undone
Surrender all to reason, open wide to take in
That which was long forgotten when you first came running

Come away with me, don't you judge or doubt
Just remember who you are and where you're bound
It's time for you to rise above all this
Take the hand that's offered, learn to use it
Find your voice and find your way
To keep reminding each step along the way
Of how fortunate you truly are

Let go, let go
Give in, give in
Trust yourself enough to follow
I am always by your side
Trust yourself enough to follow
Open up so I may whisper
As well as speak so that together, you and I might learn to feel safe and free


It's time to choose to leave these fears behind
Remember who you are, learn to fly and learn to swim
Fear can bind and weaken you until the end
Learn to trust yourself, learn to sleep and dream

I'm not the center of the universe
And I don't wanna be the center of your
You are enough for me, baby
The way you look at me sets me free
I am just a part of everything


Open up to me now
Show me something that I haven't seen before
It doesn't have to be high or bright or loud
Just give it all right back to me


Trust in my care and trust in our love
Trust in the time we've spent together
It was yesterday when I first laid eyes upon you
Take my hand, take a piece of this
It's like you told me, "Give and take"
It is easy when we both come alive
So why don't you open up to me?




My center is always looking away from me
And there is no one who can say differently
I am but an aspect of a grand design
If only we could see ourselves as such
Then what we would surely find


Is life itself breathing deep
Letting out a sigh of relief and then
Shedding the skin that confines us
And opens us wide to receive the light

If I may borrow a couple of lines from the great poet, David Bowie
The whole world's been so cold and sad that I wanted to leave it all behind
It was as if every time you opened your mouth, you just spoke nonsense
You said things like "I'm gonna get some sun and then I'll be back soon"


Well, we might not have got away with it this time
But oh, what fun, we sure had getting outta your mind
So long as you weren't too serious, yeah
We could use something easy and familiar


Like our old friend Elvis or Buddy Holly


That's the only way we know how to speak to you anymore
This is our love letter now, our final gesture
Please don't think less of me, my patience has worn thin
Trust in me when I say, there will always be someone

And he won't judge you quite the same, as the others do
There were two sides, well, three actually, to our relationship
One side would go out, take on water like any other
One side would stay sober and grounded, while the other went swinging through
Shrouding his face within ashes until no one could see him coming


He never meant to hurt anyone but still did anyway
Even at those times when he hadn't a care in the world
Like the moment when he was trying to get into Heaven
Jesus Christ, why can't people read? Why can't they read?

I have a question for you
How did your smile get so high?
What happened to the loving look in your eye?


Why don't you cry? Why don't you cry?
Tell me what hurts, why can't I see it in your eyes?


Your halo seems heavy
Like someone just told you a lie
Maybe now is not the time to speak our minds


Why don't you cry? Why don't you cry?
Tell me what hurts, why can't I see it in your eyes?


You are my guiding light, you know
My way too well
When all hope has grown cold and hopeless
It is you who set me free


Your voice reminds me of grace
And how much more we must learn to forgive
But oh Lord I will love you forever
As long as breath remains within me


This question still lingers
Where did your smile go? Where did your soul begin?
Wasn't it enough that heaven's angels gave up one day?


If only I could save you
From this place filled with sin
Why don't you try to forgive before it's time?

I can't breathe, oh my fucking head hurts
I can't see and I am in so much pain
This is all because of you


I wish that you were dead right now
You would feel no pain, your blood wouldn't boil
You could sleep for a million years
Just don't come back down




Your little piece of heaven? You better leave it
You are the problem here, why don't you leave already?
You suck like a vampire, drain our energy
How about we just kill this motherfuckin' vampire?





Can't breathe, oh my fucking head hurts
I can't see and I am in so much pain
This is all because of you


My heart beats too fast when I think of you
So take whatever you want, fuckin' parasite
What goes around comes back to get you
Trust me, I know everything there is to know about you


Why don't you go choke on a fucking nail or die, you worthless leech?
The only time you've been any kind of use was while sucking up my life's blood from my veins


Fuck off! Fuck off!

We know your kind
You think you're tough
But the truth is
There are some things that we can do to hurt you
To bring you down
And make you feel the pain


I don't speak for myself, I don't speak for my brother
Don't judge, just point out the problem
Who made this mess? You did and so-called friends
Justify their own behavior with stories, they tell themselves
So-called friends just want someone else to blame

It hurts us when you lie
You should have a place in hell for this kind of guy


Asshole!


Fools like you just hurt your own people
With empty words while getting nothing done
The only time you ever spoke up was when it benefited you
Well, what goes around comes back around, doesn't it?
Bet your ass we all laughed our asses off as we spit on your grave




Suckin' dick
Fuck you, fuck yourself

I'm an animal, I am a free spirit
And the only way to start my day is with you
Animal instinct, this one's natural to me
Don't even judge it, just let yourself go


We are wild and we belong to you
You have control of everything that we do
So what if I want your center of attention?
Just give it up already, don't ya know you want it?

Let yourself go
It won't hurt no one but me
Let yourself go
Just feel everything but me
You have no reason not to
Feel everything but me
If you will just open up to me


A creature born in the jungle
The first memory that came through was your touch
Why don't you drop the act, take me away from here?
This center of attraction has become stale and boring


What's happened to all the magic?
There were millions of people before you
What's happened to our innocence?
Where did they all come from if not from you?

You have controlled every move I made
You've been controlling everything I've said
My freedom slowly fades away as I speak
But now there seems to be nothing left for me to say

How could I have let you get so close?
How could I have thought this would not end?
When the tiger got bored he attacked his own skin
Lookin' out on his bloodied hands


What's happening to me? Why can't I see?
Have you driven me mad? Do I need treatment?
All I know is that I need you right now
Can't breathe without you


They call me an addict
It bothers me when others criticize
I'm an addict and you might wanna listen
Find a place inside of me where you like to stay
Give it up
